sections.description:
WPNexa Importer brings the entire WPNexa template store right into your WordPress dashboard. WPNexa is a curated marketplace of premium Elementor templates across a wide range of categories — every design crafted to be beautiful, fast, and performance-optimized out of the box.

No more manual setup, broken layouts, or hours of configuration. Browse the library, choose a template, and import it in a single click — the plugin handles everything for you:

  • Complete one-click import — pages, content, images, and template structure
  • Pixel-perfect styling — colors, typography, and Elementor global settings preserved as designed
  • Required plugins & theme installed and activated automatically
  • Speed-first templates built for fast load times and great Core Web Vitals
  • Wide category selection — business, portfolio, store, blog, landing pages and more
  • Beginner-friendly — no code or Elementor expertise needed

Launch a stunning, high-performance Elementor site in minutes. For more information, please visit wpnexa.com/how-it-works.
sections.installation:
1. Download the WPNexa Importer plugin ZIP file.
  2. Go to your WordPress dashboard.
  3. Navigate to Plugins > Add New.
  4. Click Upload Plugin.
  5. Select the wpnexa-importer.zip file and click Install Now.
  6. After installation, click Activate Plugin.
